e.p: Welcome! Can you tell me about your role here?
e.m: Nói tên vị trí; Nói công việc chính bạn sẽ làm; Nói một điều bạn mong đợi hôm nay.
e.h: Present Simple for role, will/going to for plans.
e.s: I am a customer service assistant. I will answer emails and help customers. Today I expect to meet the team.

e.p: Do you know where to find the office supplies?
e.m: Nói bạn đã tìm thấy chưa; Nói chỗ bạn tìm được (phòng/kệ); Nói bạn sẽ làm gì nếu không tìm thấy.
e.h: Use Past Simple or Present Perfect + will for plan.
e.s: I found the supplies in the storage room yesterday. The paper and pens are on the middle shelf. If I cannot find something, I will ask a coworker.

e.p: Who did HR introduce you to this morning?
e.m: Nói tên chức danh người giới thiệu; Nói việc họ làm với bạn; Nói cảm xúc của bạn về buổi giới thiệu.
e.h: Past Simple + 'and' to join clauses.
e.s: HR introduced me to the team leader and the HR manager. They showed me my desk and the schedule. I felt excited after the introduction.

e.p: Do you need help setting up your computer?
e.m: Nói bạn đã làm xong hay chưa; Nói điều bạn đã làm hoặc chưa làm; Nói bạn sẽ làm gì tiếp theo.
e.h: Use Present Perfect for completed actions and will for next step.
e.s: I have not set up my computer yet. I connected the monitor but I did not install the software. I will ask IT for help this afternoon.

e.p: What would make your first week easier?
e.m: Đưa ra hai đề nghị cụ thể; Nói lý do cho mỗi đề nghị.
e.h: Use should/must and because for reasons.
e.s: The team should give a simple guide because it will save time. I think I must have a short meeting with my manager because I need clear tasks.

d.t: Nói về công việc hàng ngày

e.p: What do you do every morning at work?
e.m: Nói 2 việc bạn làm sáng nào; Nói thứ tự công việc.
e.h: Present Simple + then/and to show order.
e.s: I check emails first and then I join a short team meeting. After the meeting I start my tasks for the day.

e.p: Do you have a daily meeting with your team?
e.m: Nói có hay không; Nói thời gian họp; Nói nội dung chính của cuộc họp.
e.h: Use Present Simple and a short clause with because.
e.s: Yes, we have a daily meeting at 9 a.m. We discuss priorities and deadlines. It helps us plan the day.

e.p: How do you manage your tasks when you are busy?
e.m: Nói 2 cách bạn sắp xếp công việc; Nói kết quả bạn mong đợi.
e.h: Use Comparatives (more/less) or will for result.
e.s: I make a list and I do the most important tasks first. This method is more effective and I finish work on time.

e.p: Do you ever work from home?
e.m: Nói nếu bạn có làm; Nói khi bạn làm; Nói lợi ích của làm việc từ xa.
e.h: Use Present Simple and 'because' for reason.
e.s: I sometimes work from home on Fridays. I do quiet tasks and answer emails there. It is easier because I can focus more.

e.p: Can you suggest one change to improve daily work?
e.m: Đưa ra đề nghị cụ thể; Nói cách thực hiện; Nói kết quả mong muốn.
e.h: Use should + V and will for result.
e.s: We should start meetings five minutes late to prepare. The manager can set a short agenda before each meeting. This will make meetings shorter and clearer.

e.p: How do you find the office space?
e.m: Mô tả ngắn văn phòng (sạch/ồn/etc); Nói bạn thích hay không; Nói lý do.
e.h: Use Present Simple and because.
e.s: The office is bright and quiet. I like it because I can concentrate. It is also clean and comfortable.

e.p: Is the office safe for employees?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói ví dụ về an toàn; Nói điều bạn sẽ làm nếu không an toàn.
e.h: Use must/should for rules and will for future action.
e.s: Yes, the office is safe and we have clear exits. We must follow safety rules and wear badges. If it is not safe, I will tell the manager.

e.p: Are there quiet rooms for focused work?
e.m: Nói có hay không; Nói chỗ ở đâu; Nói quy tắc ngắn dùng phòng đó.
e.h: Present Simple + have to/should for rules.
e.s: Yes, there is a quiet room next to the kitchen. People can book it for one hour. You have to turn off your phone there.

e.p: What makes a workspace comfortable for you?
e.m: Nêu hai yếu tố; Nói cách những yếu tố đó giúp bạn làm việc.
e.h: Use comparatives (more comfortable) and because.
e.s: Good lighting and a comfortable chair make work more comfortable. They reduce tiredness and help me focus.

e.p: Can the company change anything to improve the office?
e.m: Đề xuất một thay đổi cụ thể; Nói cách thực hiện; Nói lợi ích cho nhân viên.
e.h: Use should and will for benefit.
e.s: The company should add plants and soft lighting in the break area. They can buy a few plants and change bulbs. This will make the place calmer and boost mood.

e.p: Who do you work with today?
e.m: Nói tên chức danh một người; Nói công việc họ làm; Nói mối quan hệ công việc giữa hai người.
e.h: Use Past Simple or Present Simple and 'and' to join.
e.s: I work with a project manager. She plans tasks and checks progress. We discuss tasks and support each other.

e.p: Is your manager helpful when you need support?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói ví dụ hỗ trợ; Nói cảm xúc của bạn.
e.h: Use Present Simple and because.
e.s: Yes, my manager is helpful and answers my questions. He gives clear feedback and helps solve problems. I feel supported.

e.p: How do you give feedback to a colleague?
e.m: Nói bạn thường làm gì; Nói khi nào bạn nói; Nói mục tiêu khi đưa phản hồi.
e.h: Use Present Simple and should for advice.
e.s: I talk to the colleague after the task and I give simple examples. I speak politely and I choose a quiet time. I want to help them improve.

e.p: A coworker is late with their part of a project. What do you say?
e.m: Nói một câu hỏi bạn sẽ hỏi; Nói một đề nghị để giải quyết; Nói điều bạn muốn đạt được.
e.h: Use Past Simple or Present Simple and will for plan.
e.s: Can you tell me when you will finish your part? I can help or we can adjust the schedule. I want the project to meet the deadline.

e.p: How do you build trust with your team?
e.m: Nêu hai hành động cụ thể; Nói kết quả mong đợi.
e.h: Use Present Simple and because for reason.
e.s: I do tasks on time and I help others when they need it. I also speak honestly and respect ideas. Because of this, the team trusts me more.

e.p: How often do you get a salary review?
e.m: Nói tần suất (tháng/năm); Nói ai làm review; Nói mong muốn ngắn.
e.h: Use Present Simple and would like for wish.
e.s: We have a salary review once a year. The HR and manager do the review. I would like clear criteria for the raise.

e.p: Does the company give bonuses?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói loại bonus; Nói điều kiện nhận bonus.
e.h: Present Simple and if for condition.
e.s: Yes, the company gives performance bonuses. They are cash rewards for good results. You get a bonus if you meet targets.

e.p: Can you explain the health benefits?
e.m: Nói loại phúc lợi sức khỏe; Nói ai được hưởng; Nói cách đăng ký.
e.h: Use Present Simple and have to for steps.
e.s: We have health insurance and yearly check-ups. All full-time employees receive them. You have to sign up with HR.

e.p: What would make the reward system fairer?
e.m: Đưa ra một thay đổi; Nói cách thực hiện; Nói kết quả mong đợi.
e.h: Use should and will for result.
e.s: The company should make goals clearer with points for each task. Managers can list the points and share them. This will make rewards fairer.

e.p: I want to ask for a pay raise. What should I say?
e.m: Nói hai điều bạn sẽ nói để xin tăng lương; Nói lý do chính để yêu cầu.
e.h: Use Past Simple for achievements and would like for request.
e.s: I completed my targets and I improved sales last quarter. I would like to discuss a pay raise because of these results.

d.t: Thời gian làm việc và nghỉ phép

e.p: What are your working hours?
e.m: Nói giờ bắt đầu và kết thúc; Nói có làm ngoài giờ không; Nói ngày nghỉ thường.
e.h: Use Present Simple and sometimes for frequency.
e.s: I start at 9 a.m. and finish at 5 p.m. I sometimes work late and my day off is Sunday.

e.p: How many vacation days do you have?
e.m: Nói số ngày; Nói ai duyệt nghỉ; Nói bạn sẽ làm gì trong kỳ nghỉ.
e.h: Present Simple and will for future plan.
e.s: I have fifteen vacation days per year. My manager approves the leave. I will travel with my family during the break.

e.p: Can you swap a shift with a colleague?
e.m: Nói nếu có thể; Nói điều kiện để đổi; Nói bạn sẽ thông báo ai.
e.h: Use can/cannot and have to for rules.
e.s: Yes, we can swap shifts with permission. You have to ask the manager and check the schedule. I will inform HR after we agree.

e.p: I need an urgent day off tomorrow. What should I do?
e.m: Nói bước bạn sẽ làm hôm nay; Nói ai bạn sẽ báo; Nói bạn sẽ làm việc bù ra sao.
e.h: Use will and should for suggestions.
e.s: I will tell my manager now and send a short email. I should find a coworker to cover my task. I will complete the work on Friday.

e.p: Would flexible hours help employees?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói hai lợi ích; Nói một điều công ty phải làm để thực hiện.
e.h: Use would and because, and need to for requirement.
e.s: Yes, flexible hours would help employees. It can reduce stress and improve work-life balance. The company needs to set clear rules for requests.

d.t: Đào tạo và cơ hội phát triển

e.p: Have you attended any training here?
e.m: Nói có hay không; Nói tên một khoá học; Nói bạn học được gì.
e.h: Use Present Perfect or Past Simple and learned.
e.s: I attended a customer service training last month. I learned better phone skills. It helped me talk to clients calmly.

e.p: Does the company support further study?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói loại hỗ trợ; Nói điều kiện nhận hỗ trợ.
e.h: Use Present Simple and if for condition.
e.s: Yes, the company supports courses and part-time study. They give partial funding and time off. You get support if the course relates to your job.

e.p: How do you apply for a course?
e.m: Nói bước đăng ký; Nói ai duyệt; Nói bạn làm gì sau khi học xong.
e.h: Use Present Simple and will for next action.
e.s: You fill a form and give it to HR. The manager approves the application. After the course, I will share what I learned with the team.

e.p: I want to improve my skills. What can I do weekly?
e.m: Đưa ra hai hoạt động cụ thể; Nói kết quả bạn mong muốn.
e.h: Use should and will for result.
e.s: You should practice tasks for 30 minutes each day and read one short article weekly. This will improve your skills and confidence.

e.p: Can the company make training better?
e.m: Đề xuất một thay đổi; Nói cách thực hiện; Nói lợi ích cho mọi người.
e.h: Use should + V and because.
e.s: The company should offer short online lessons because many people are busy. They can record sessions and share materials. This will help more staff join training.

d.t: Phúc lợi và giữ chân nhân viên

e.p: What benefits do you like most at work?
e.m: Nêu một phúc lợi bạn thích; Nói vì sao; Nói bạn có dùng thường xuyên không.
e.h: Present Simple and because; use sometimes/always.
e.s: I like the health insurance most because it gives peace of mind. I use it sometimes for check-ups. It feels secure.

e.p: Does free food at the office help keep staff?
e.m: Trả lời ý kiến (yes/no); Nói một lý do; Nói một hạn chế của phúc lợi này.
e.h: Use Present Simple and but for contrast.
e.s: Yes, free food helps staff feel cared for because it saves time and money. But it may not help those with special diets.

e.p: What benefit would you add to keep employees longer?
e.m: Đề xuất một phúc lợi mới; Nói cách công ty cung cấp; Nói lý do nó giúp giữ nhân viên.
e.h: Use would and because for reason.
e.s: I would add flexible work hours and allow remote days. The company can set a policy for two remote days per month. This will help employees stay because they get balance.

e.p: How can managers show they value staff?
e.m: Nêu hai hành động cụ thể; Nói kết quả tốt cho nhân viên.
e.h: Use Present Simple and because.
e.s: Managers can give regular feedback and small rewards like gift cards. They can also celebrate team wins. Because of this, staff feel valued and stay longer.

e.p: If you were HR, what one change would you make to improve retention?
e.m: Đưa ra một thay đổi chính; Nói cách thực hiện; Nói hiệu quả mong đợi.
e.h: Use would and will for expected effect.
e.s: I would create a clear career path with steps and training. HR will map roles and share the path with employees. This will increase motivation and retention.

e.p: Two colleagues argue about a task. What do you do first?
e.m: Nói hành động đầu tiên bạn làm; Nói lý do; Nói bạn sẽ nói với họ điều gì ngắn.
e.h: Use should and because; keep sentences short.
e.s: I should listen to both people first because I need facts. I will ask them to explain calmly. I will say we must find a solution together.

e.p: One coworker is angry with you. How do you respond?
e.m: Nói một câu xin lỗi nếu cần; Nói giải thích ngắn; Nói đề nghị giải quyết.
e.h: Use Past Simple for action and would like for offer.
e.s: I am sorry if I made a mistake. I explained what happened and I listened. I would like to meet and fix the problem.

e.p: Can HR mediate a small conflict?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói khi nào gọi HR; Nói mục tiêu của cuộc hòa giải.
e.h: Present Simple and will for aim.
e.s: Yes, HR can mediate when issues continue or affect work. Call HR after you try to talk and the problem stays. The goal is to agree and keep work smooth.

e.p: What rules should a team have to avoid conflicts?
e.m: Nêu hai quy tắc; Nói cách thực hiện; Nói lợi ích khi tuân theo.
e.h: Use should + V and because.
e.s: Teams should communicate tasks clearly and respect deadlines. They should also give polite feedback and listen. Because of this, conflicts will be fewer and teamwork improves.

e.p: A conflict affects a project deadline. What is your plan?
e.m: Nói hai bước bạn sẽ làm ngay; Nói ai bạn sẽ báo; Nói mục tiêu để cứu deadline.
e.h: Use will for immediate actions and should for plan.
e.s: I will talk to both people and reassign urgent tasks. I will tell the manager about the delay. We should set a short plan to finish on time.

d.t: Yêu cầu thay đổi công việc

e.p: Can I change my shift next week?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói điều kiện cơ bản; Nói ai phải duyệt.
e.h: Use can/cannot and have to for approval.
e.s: You can change your shift if a colleague agrees. You have to check the schedule first. Your manager must approve the change.

e.p: I want to do a different task. How can I ask?
e.m: Nói một câu bạn sẽ nói với quản lý; Nói lý do ngắn; Nói mong đợi kết quả.
e.h: Use would like and because.
e.s: I would like to try a different task because it matches my skills. I ask for a short trial period. I expect to learn and help the team more.

e.p: Is it possible to move to another team?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói điều kiện; Nói bước tiếp theo bạn làm.
e.h: Present Simple and then for next step.
e.s: Yes, it is possible if there is a vacancy and your manager agrees. Then you apply and meet the new team. I will prepare my reasons and skills.

e.p: How do you negotiate extra tasks without more pay?
e.m: Nêu một câu bạn nói; Nói lợi ích cho công ty; Nói yêu cầu đổi lại (ví dụ: thời gian linh hoạt).
e.h: Use will and because, and would like for request.
e.s: I can say I will take extra tasks to help the team because I want to learn. In return, I would like flexible hours once a week.

e.p: If you change role, what support would you need?
e.m: Nêu hai hỗ trợ cụ thể; Nói cách những hỗ trợ đó giúp bạn thành công.
e.h: Use need to and will for result.
e.s: I need short training and a mentor for the first month. This will help me learn quickly and do the job well.

d.t: Phỏng vấn thăng tiến nội bộ

e.p: Why do you want this promotion?
e.m: Nói lý do chính ngắn; Nói một kỹ năng bạn có; Nói bạn sẽ làm gì khác nếu được chọn.
e.h: Use would like and because; short sentences.
e.s: I would like the promotion because I want more responsibility. I have good project management skills. I will lead the team and improve results.

e.p: What experience do you have for this role?
e.m: Nói một dự án bạn đã làm; Nói kết quả ngắn; Nói thời gian bạn làm việc liên quan.
e.h: Use Past Simple and for duration.
e.s: I led a small project last year and we met our goals. The project increased sales by five percent. I worked in this role for two years.

e.p: How will you handle a bigger team?
e.m: Nói hai hành động bạn sẽ làm; Nói kết quả mong đợi.
e.h: Use will for future plan and because.
e.s: I will set clear tasks and weekly check-ins. I will listen to the team and give feedback. Because of this, the team will work better.

e.p: What is your weakness and how do you improve it?
e.m: Nói một điểm yếu ngắn; Nói bạn đã làm gì để cải thiện; Nói kết quả bạn thấy.
e.h: Use Past Simple for action and have improved for result.
e.s: I was nervous in big meetings, so I practiced presentations. I joined a short course and spoke more in meetings. I have improved and feel more confident now.

e.p: If selected, what is your first priority?
e.m: Nêu ưu tiên chính; Nói hai bước đầu bạn sẽ làm; Nói kết quả bạn mong đạt được trong tháng đầu.
e.h: Use will for plan and will + verb for result.
e.s: My first priority will be to review ongoing projects. I will meet each project leader and set clear deadlines. I want projects to be on track in the first month.

d.t: Sự kiện nhóm và văn hóa công ty

e.p: Do you join the team lunch today?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói lý do ngắn; Nói bạn muốn ngồi với ai.
e.h: Present Simple and because.
e.s: Yes, I will join the team lunch because I want to know everyone. I want to sit with the new team members.

e.p: What do you like about company events?
e.m: Nêu một điều bạn thích; Nói ví dụ; Nói cảm xúc của bạn.
e.h: Use Present Simple and because.
e.s: I like casual events because they help us talk outside work. For example, we had a picnic last month. I felt relaxed and happy.

e.p: Can we have a small weekly social time?
e.m: Trả lời ý kiến; Nói cách tổ chức; Nói lợi ích cho team.
e.h: Use should and will for benefit.
e.s: Yes, we should have a short social time on Fridays. The team can chat for 15 minutes after work. This will build better relations.

e.p: Our culture feels strict. How can we make it friendlier?
e.m: Đưa ra hai thay đổi nhỏ; Nói cách thực hiện; Nói kết quả mong đợi.
e.h: Use could/should and because.
e.s: We could add casual dress days and short team breaks. Managers should encourage friendly chats and praise. This will make the culture warmer and more open.

e.p: What traditions should the company keep?
e.m: Chọn một truyền thống; Nói lý do; Nói cách bạn sẽ tham gia.
e.h: Use Present Simple and will for action.
e.s: The annual team picnic is important because it connects everyone. I will help plan games and invite colleagues. I will join and support the event.

d.t: Ôn tập: Gặp quản lý để nói về giữ chân nhân viên

e.p: Manager: We are worried about turnover. What do you think?
e.m: Đưa ra hai nguyên nhân ngắn; Nói một đề xuất để giữ nhân viên.
e.h: Use Present Simple and should for suggestion.
e.s: Many employees leave because they want growth and better pay. Another reason is lack of recognition. The company should offer training and clear raises.

e.p: Manager: Can you give one quick idea to improve culture?
e.m: Đưa ý tưởng ngắn; Nói cách thực hiện; Nói lợi ích cho nhân viên.
e.h: Use should and will for benefit.
e.s: We should start short weekly chats to share wins. A manager can host five-minute sessions each Friday. This will boost morale and connection.

e.p: Manager: How to help new hires feel welcome?
e.m: Nêu hai hành động cụ thể; Nói ai làm; Nói kết quả mong đợi.
e.h: Use Present Simple and because.
e.s: We pair new hires with a buddy and give a simple guide. HR and team leaders will do this. Because of that, newcomers will settle faster.

e.p: Manager: Should we change benefits to keep staff?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói một lợi ích đề xuất; Nói cách đo hiệu quả.
e.h: Use Yes/No and will for measuring effect.
e.s: Yes, we should add flexible work options like remote days. We will track retention and employee surveys to measure effect.

e.p: Manager: I want a short report by Monday. Can you prepare it?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói những nội dung bạn sẽ đưa vào báo cáo (2 mục); Nói khi bạn nộp.
e.h: Use will for promise and by + time.
e.s: Yes, I will prepare the report. I will include causes of turnover and suggested actions. I will submit it by Monday morning.

d.t: Ôn tập: Thảo luận chính sách và môi trường

e.p: Colleague: Is our sick leave policy clear?
e.m: Trả lời ý kiến; Nói một điều rõ ràng; Nói một điều cần cải thiện.
e.h: Use Present Simple and should for improvement.
e.s: The policy is mostly clear and states days and pay. It clearly says when to notify HR. But it should explain the approval steps more.

e.p: Colleague: How is the workspace for focused work?
e.m: Đánh giá ngắn; Nói một ví dụ hiện tại; Nói đề nghị để cải thiện.
e.h: Use Present Simple and would for suggestion.
e.s: The workspace is generally good for focus. We have a quiet room and headphones available. I would suggest more booking slots for peak times.

e.p: HR: We plan to change shifts. Any concerns?
e.m: Nói một mối quan tâm; Nói một đề nghị giảm rủi ro; Nói kết quả mong muốn.
e.h: Use will and because.
e.s: Some people may struggle with childcare and night shifts. We should offer flexible start times or shift swaps. This will reduce stress and keep staff.

e.p: HR: Should we increase training budget?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói một lợi ích; Nói cách dùng ngân sách ngắn.
e.h: Use Yes/No and will for benefit.
e.s: Yes, we should increase the training budget. It will improve skills and retention. We can spend it on short online courses and mentors.

e.p: HR: Tell me one quick change to make the office safer.
e.m: Đưa ra thay đổi cụ thể; Nói cách thực hiện; Nói ai chịu trách nhiệm.
e.h: Use should and will for action.
e.s: We should add clearer exit signs and lights. Facilities can check signs this week. Safety staff will install them.

d.t: Ôn tập: Phỏng vấn nghỉ việc

e.p: Interviewer: Why are you leaving the company?
e.m: Nói một lý do chính ngắn; Nói một ví dụ hỗ trợ; Nói điều bạn mong công ty cải thiện.
e.h: Use Past Simple and would like for suggestion.
e.s: I am leaving for a new opportunity and growth. For example, I did not get training last year. I would like the company to offer clearer career steps.

e.p: Interviewer: Did you feel supported here?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói một ví dụ khi bạn được hỗ trợ; Nói một điều chưa tốt.
e.h: Present Simple/Past Simple and because.
e.s: Yes, I felt supported during project work when my manager helped. But communication about changes was not always clear.

e.p: Interviewer: What one change would keep you?
e.m: Đưa ra một thay đổi chính; Nói cách thực hiện; Nói nếu bạn sẽ cân nhắc ở lại hay không.
e.h: Use would and would consider for decision.
e.s: If the company offered a clear promotion path and training, I would consider staying. They could make a step-by-step plan and discuss it with me.

e.p: Interviewer: Any feedback on team relations?
e.m: Nói một điều tốt; Nói một điều cần cải thiện; Nói đề nghị ngắn.
e.h: Use Present Simple and should for suggestion.
e.s: The team is friendly and helpful. Communication between teams should improve. I suggest short cross-team meetings.

e.p: Interviewer: Will you recommend our company to others?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; Nói lý do ngắn; Nói điều công ty nên làm để tăng đề xuất.
e.h: Use Yes/No and because and will for suggestion.
e.s: Yes, I will recommend the company because of the supportive team and good benefits. The company can improve training to make recommendations stronger.
